query:
ALTER TABLE move_analyses
  ADD COLUMN timestamp_ms INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN timestamp_confidence FLOAT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN frame_key TEXT NULL;

ALTER TABLE processed_games
  ADD COLUMN is_public TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN share_token VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN white_accuracy FLOAT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN black_accuracy FLOAT NULL;
